title: centaurea ucriae subsp. todaroi
intro: Centaurea ucriae subsp. todaroi, also known as Todaro's knapweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and to treat various gastrointestinal issues, such as constipation and indigestion. The health benefits of Centaurea ucriae subsp. todaroi include its ability to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and act as an antioxidant. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations, such as infusions and tinctures, which are taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
